_comment: Folio legal docs manifest. Source of truth for the latest ToS / Privacy version: a GitHub Action syncs this into Supabase tos_versions (which the app reads), and it is also bundled into the app as an offline fallback. Bump version + summary when ToS / Privacy changes.

terms.summary_zh: v1.1：版本號提升至 1.1；服務條款實質條文內容未變更。
terms.summary_en: v1.1: Version bumped to 1.1; no change to the substantive Terms of Service content.

privacy.summary_zh: v1.1：版本號提升至 1.1；隱私權政策實質條文內容未變更。
privacy.summary_en: v1.1: Version bumped to 1.1; no change to the substantive Privacy Policy content.
